description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.2: Chat-path performance — cut MCP tool-call overhead roughly in half by parallelizing the two retrieval lanes via asyncio.gather, warming ONNX models at server startup (warmup_ce + warmup_embedding background tasks), and offloading the CE rerank to asyncio.to_thread. Plus a lifecycle age-gate fix (promotion_service.py now falls back to created_at when timestamp is absent) and two v0.5.1 profile-resolution fixes (roampal doctor --profile and the start banner both now honor named profiles). Retrieval quality unchanged. 541 tests passing.
